post_claim_english_paraphrase: The UN's Gaza civilian death claims are accepted by some Sri Lankans while UN-linked Mullivaikkal claims are rejected.
source_needed: Current Gaza source route and evidence of local discourse reaction
source_check_result: Analogy observable in the post; public-reaction generalization not independently evidenced.
publication_note: Keep as analysis of rhetoric, not a verified description of all Sri Lankan opinion.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: The UN says more than 40000 civilians died in Mullivaikkal.
source_needed: UN Panel wording; OISL; later NGO/remembrance wording
source_check_result: UN Panel supports up to 40000 final-phase/Vanni civilian deaths; it does not verify Mullivaikkal-only wording.
publication_note: Current evidence does not support this sentence as written.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: Sri Lankan forces attacked hospitals in the final phase.
source_needed: UN Panel; OISL; State Department; ICRC/hospital routes
source_check_result: Strongly supported as an incident-pattern claim, though sentence-level site details still need mapping.
publication_note: Safe only if site and time labels are explicit.

original_sinhala_theme: attacks on shelters and food lines
post_claim_english_paraphrase: Sri Lankan forces attacked IDP shelters and food-distribution lines.
source_needed: UN Panel; OISL; specific incident routes
source_check_result: Supported in broad pattern terms; specific incidents should be cited separately.
publication_note: Do not compress multiple site types into one unsupported mega-claim.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: Sri Lankan forces attacked areas where UN staff or ICRC-linked workers were present.
source_check_result: Broadly plausible from the evidence environment, but sentence-level proof still needs direct incident mapping.
publication_note: Use only after splitting by incident and source.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: The LTTE held large numbers of civilians as hostages or human shields and shot at people who tried to flee.
source_check_result: Strongly supported as contextual final-phase conduct by the LTTE.
publication_note: Important context and not a moral excuse for state violations.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: The Rajapaksa government prioritized ending the war quickly and sacrificed more than 40000 civilians for that political objective.
source_needed: Decision records; military logs; UN/OISL; chronology
source_check_result: Evidence supports severe civilian-harm allegations and pressure to finish the war, but motive and sacrifice wording require a higher gate.
publication_note: Do not publish this as a proved motive claim yet.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: UN and ICRC asked Sri Lanka not to use heavy weapons at Mullivaikkal but attacks continued.
source_needed: UN/ICRC statements; Panel; OISL; government commitments
source_check_result: Needs direct warning/commitment sourcing before it becomes public-safe.
publication_note: Likely supportable, but still needs a direct warning chain.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: Sri Lanka remembers fallen soldiers but does not adequately remember Tamil civilians killed in the final phase.
source_needed: State commemoration practice; memorial restrictions; HRW/Amnesty; Special Procedures
source_check_result: Broadly supportable as a civic-memory claim with postwar memorialization evidence.
publication_note: Admissible if kept at the level of practice and restrictions, not total social psychology.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: Families are prevented from memorializing the dead and are sometimes treated as suspect or terrorist-linked.
source_needed: HRW/Amnesty/Special Procedures and local case routes
source_check_result: Supported as a documented restriction pattern, but time periods and administrations must be distinguished.
publication_note: Do not universalize across all years or all administrations.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: The LTTE killed civilians and was a terrorist organization.
source_check_result: Broadly supportable context claim, though this package is not primarily an LTTE-proscription file.
publication_note: Admissible context if not used as a state-conduct excuse.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: A state has a higher duty than a terrorist organization and cannot justify civilian harm by moral equivalence.
source_check_result: This is an argument, not a factual claim requiring empirical proof.
publication_note: Publish only as explicit normative analysis.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: The post may have been AI-written.
source_needed: Drafting metadata; admission; stylometry; overlap or prompt residue
source_check_result: No forensic evidence captured in this pass.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: The post may have absorbed SEO-driven Tamil diaspora propaganda.
source_needed: Exact phrase overlap; citation genealogy; author source trail; SEO graph
source_check_result: Current evidence supports citation propagation and high-authority repetition; it does not prove author intent or funded coordination.
publication_note: Keep as a research hypothesis, not a finding.

post_claim_english_paraphrase: The post's image is documentary evidence of a direct Gaza-to-Mullivaikkal visual chain.
source_check_result: Current assessment: unverified composite or editorial image, not documentary proof.
